score_policy: No average realism or biological-accuracy percentage is identifiable. Closed statuses apply only to each entry's exact scope.

status_semantics.closed: Every requirement inside the narrowly declared scope is implemented and verified.
status_semantics.partial: A tested contract or numerical layer exists, but the declared capability is incomplete.
status_semantics.blocked_missing_evidence: Activation would require unavailable context-matched measurements; values remain null.
status_semantics.external_action_required: The requirement cannot be completed by repository code or literature intake alone.
status_semantics.not_applicable_at_model_scale: The requested representation is the wrong abstraction at whole-cell scale.

entries.title: Dimensionless cytosol transport numerics
entries.scope: Numerical test-bed only; no biological pressure, velocity, time or diffusivity claim.
entries.current_capability: A 3D pressure-projection grid, moving analytic obstacles and conservative passive-scalar kernel with moving-domain remapping are tested and active in the renderer.

entries.title: Healthy-PHH cytosol constitutive parameters
entries.scope: Healthy adult primary-human-hepatocyte aqueous phase.
entries.current_capability: Ten typed parameter slots are explicit and all remain null.
remaining_requirements: Matched intracellular-water/cytosol fraction and aqueous volume.
Probe- and scale-resolved viscosity or apparent diffusivity.
Hydraulic permeability, cytoskeletal modulus, pressure and velocity validation.

entries.title: Legacy 0.52 cytosol-fraction quarantine
entries.scope: Prevention of the legacy fraction from parameterizing quantitative fluid or reaction claims.
entries.current_capability: The value remains visible for legacy exploratory reaction-volume compatibility and is explicitly barred from quantitative fluid/reaction use.

entries.title: Quantitative CFD or poroelastic solver
entries.scope: Biological-unit Brinkman/poroelastic flow in healthy PHH.
entries.current_capability: No quantitative solver is enabled; the dimensionless renderer solver cannot be relabelled as CFD calibration.
remaining_requirements: Healthy-PHH constitutive coefficients and boundary conditions.
Matched pressure/velocity or displacement-relaxation validation trajectories.
Grid-convergence and uncertainty-qualified biological validation.

entries.title: Cytosol-to-membrane fluid-structure feedback
entries.scope: Pressure/traction feedback from the aqueous/poroelastic phase to membrane, cortex and organelles.
entries.current_capability: Membrane motion drives the numerical fluid map; uncalibrated pressure cannot push the membrane.
remaining_requirements: PHH membrane/cortex mechanics and hydraulic boundary data.
A coupled stable discretization with force/energy consistency tests.
Matched deformation and relaxation validation.

entries.title: Organelle-resolved fluid boundaries
entries.scope: Impermeable moving organelle surfaces in the numerical cytosol domain.
entries.current_capability: Analytic moving sphere, ellipsoid and capsule obstacles exclude flow/scalar cells, but full mitochondrial, ER and Golgi meshes are not watertight fluid boundaries.
remaining_requirements: Watertight organelle meshes with per-frame transforms.
No-flux and moving-boundary conditions on the actual surfaces.
Resolution/conservation tests for thin ER and Golgi structures.

entries.title: Local non-affine membrane-to-fluid coupling
entries.scope: Local folds, buds, endocytosis, exocytosis and topology change.
entries.current_capability: The fluid grid follows the global volume-preserving affine membrane map only.
remaining_requirements: Remeshing and topology-change representation.
Locally conservative moving-boundary coupling.
Event-specific membrane reservoir and neck mechanics evidence.

entries.title: Explicit water-molecule representation
entries.scope: Whole-cell mesoscale renderer and transport solver.
entries.current_capability: Tracer points visualize streamlines only and carry no molecule count, concentration, pressure or PHH speed claim.

entries.title: Reaction-specific advection/diffusion coupling
entries.scope: Local concentration fields may influence one reaction only after its own transport gate passes.
entries.current_capability: The conservative scalar kernel exists, but no biological species or reaction is attached.
remaining_requirements: Species-specific PHH apparent diffusivity and compartment field.
Reaction timescale and evidence that transport is limiting.
Same-context held-out validation of the coupling law.

entries.title: Molecule-scale crowding and channeling
entries.scope: Size-dependent diffusion, binding, steric exclusion and local substrate channeling.
entries.current_capability: Crowder/protein points are visual; a prohibited global viscosity or crowding multiplier is not applied.
remaining_requirements: Species-size-resolved PHH mobility data.
Local abundance/obstacle fields and binding kinetics.
Pathway-specific evidence for channeling or crowding-limited rates.

entries.title: Passive-fluid versus active-cargo separation
entries.scope: Semantic and activation separation of aqueous transport from ATP-dependent cargo motion.
entries.current_capability: The contract assigns metabolites/ions to passive advection-diffusion and vesicles to motor-track transport; cross-context motor rates cannot leak into PHH.

entries.title: Executable active intracellular transport
entries.scope: Microtubule motors, actomyosin, vesicle routing and organelle-driven active mixing in healthy PHH.
entries.current_capability: Cross-context vesicle-motion observations are retained as references; no PHH numerical kernel or rate is active.
remaining_requirements: Cargo- and route-resolved PHH trajectories.
Motor occupancy, ATP dependence, pause/reversal and fusion/fission statistics.
Independent route-level validation.

entries.title: Healthy-PHH cytosol experimental validation
entries.scope: FRAP/FCS, intracellular particle tracking, microrheology or equivalent healthy-PHH trajectories.
entries.current_capability: One healthy-human in-vivo restricted-water MRI target and ten cross-context references are registered; neither calibrates PHH cytosol mechanics.
remaining_requirements: A matched healthy-PHH intracellular transport/rheology time series with uncertainty.

entries.title: Capability-template quantitation
entries.scope: The declared 38-feature hepatocyte engineering scope.
entries.current_capability: All feature topologies and evidence requirements exist; none of the 44 numerical slots is filled or executable.
remaining_requirements: Context-matched evidence and independent validation for each individual slot.

entries.title: Quantitative reaction core
entries.scope: The 36 reactions currently active in the exploratory integrated network.
entries.current_capability: Every reaction has twelve typed evidence fields and a fail-closed transport gate; no reaction passes quantitative authority.
remaining_requirements: Exact equation, units, compartment and molecular identities.
Healthy-PHH parameter context and identifiable calibration data.
Donor-disjoint validation with uncertainty.

entries.title: Compartmental energy and redox quantitation
entries.scope: ATP/ADP/AMP, NAD(H), NADP(H), glutathione, ROS, oxygen and electrochemical states across six compartments.
entries.current_capability: Pool identities and 14 process topologies are explicit; aggregate observations cannot initialize any compartment or rate.
remaining_requirements: Compartment-resolved healthy-PHH initial states.
Matched oxygen/redox/adenylate trajectories and flux-identifying perturbations.
Resolution of legacy aggregate runtime pools.

entries.title: Receptor and signaling-chain kinetics
entries.scope: INSR, EGFR, MET, NTCP and future contact-triggered receptor chains.
entries.current_capability: Identity and selected response observations are present, while receptor density, occupancy, binding and internalization kinetics remain absent.
remaining_requirements: Domain-resolved receptor surface density and active fraction.
Two-dimensional or exposure-matched kon/koff and occupancy.
Internalization/recycling and downstream delay trajectories.

entries.title: Active protein copies and domain densities
entries.scope: BSEP, MRP2, NTCP, INSR, MET, EGFR, GLUT2 and glucokinase.
entries.current_capability: Seven-donor total abundance exists for all eight proteins; total per-nucleus protein groups are not active surface copies.
remaining_requirements: Matched total, domain-localized and functional fractions in the same PHH donors.
Surface/domain area denominator and polarity state.
Same-assay transport or signaling validation.

entries.title: Persistent cellular-memory laws
entries.scope: Epigenetic, long-lived-protein, organelle-quality and metabolic-adaptation substrates.
entries.current_capability: Twelve physical substrate contracts and a provenance-preserving event log exist; events cannot silently become memory.
remaining_requirements: Trigger-write-decay persistence trajectories in matched PHH context.
Readout laws showing how each retained substrate changes a future response.
Inheritance and reversibility evidence where applicable.

entries.title: Damage, death and recovery calibration
entries.scope: Apoptosis, necrosis, cholestasis and proteostasis outcomes in healthy PHH perturbation contexts.
entries.current_capability: Exploratory pathways and intervention scenarios exist, but commitment thresholds and recovery windows are not predictive.
remaining_requirements: Time-resolved dose-response trajectories with fate labels.
Commitment-point and washout/recovery experiments.
Donor-disjoint validation for each declared injury context.

entries.title: Joint donor-state variability model
entries.scope: Age, sex, genotype, zonation, nutrition and disease history in one donor-resolved state.
entries.current_capability: Separate donor/cohort observations exist, but cross-assay records are not fused into synthetic people and no VAE is trained.
remaining_requirements: A donor-linked multimodal training cohort and feature manifest.
Donor-level train/validation/test splits and batch covariates.
Posterior predictive and biological constraint validation.

entries.title: Donor-resolved 3D morphology and mechanics
entries.scope: In-situ hepatocyte surface, organelle distribution, cortex, adhesion and membrane mechanics.
entries.current_capability: Human aggregate 3D volume and verified proxy geometry exist; no donor mesh or matched PHH mechanical parameter set exists.
remaining_requirements: Donor-resolved in-situ membrane and organelle meshes.
Matched cortex, adhesion, tension, bending and hydraulic measurements.
Contact-interface ground truth.

entries.title: Pinned Human-GEM artifact identity
entries.scope: Exact generic reconstruction release identity and reproducible retrieval only.
entries.current_capability: Human-GEM v2.0.0 is pinned by release tag, commit, byte size and SHA-256; a streaming audit verifies structure plus scoped elemental/charge balance without vendoring 43 MB.

entries.title: Healthy-PHH FBA/FVA execution
entries.scope: A context-extracted and independently validated healthy-hepatocyte constraint model.
entries.current_capability: The generic reconstruction is pinned, but every optimization and scientific-coupling gate remains false.
remaining_requirements: Declared PHH context-extraction algorithm and donor/cohort inputs.
Measured exchange bounds, defensible objective and pinned solver.
FVA, infeasibility, reaction-level structural-audit exception resolution and independent flux validation.

entries.title: Browser visual regression automation
entries.scope: Repeatable render integrity checks for desktop/mobile browser views.
entries.current_capability: Manual in-app browser screenshot and console QA is possible and has been performed; a committed deterministic pixel baseline is absent.
remaining_requirements: A stable headless-browser test with nonblank-canvas, console and approved pixel-difference criteria.

entries.title: Independent scientific and software validation
entries.scope: External domain review, same-assay held-out validation, prospective PHH experiment and independent reproduction.
entries.current_capability: The review contract and dossier are ready; no external result artifact has been received.
remaining_requirements: Signed domain-expert review with conflicts declared.
Donor-disjoint same-assay validation.
Prospective independent wet-lab PHH result.
Independent software reproduction.
